bug_report.summary: Document word/character counts change after pilcrow cleanup (likely counting visual pilcrow/whitespace markers as content)
steps_to_reproduce: Open Zettlr and enable Editor setting to show whitespace/line endings (pilcrows).
Paste the provided long mixed-content text block (regular lines + fenced code block + regular lines).
Observe the word count/character count shown in the UI (top-right stats and/or status bar).
expected_behaviors: Word/character counts should reflect the actual document text only and remain consistent between builds for the same pasted content.
Visual whitespace/line-ending markers (e.g., pilcrow ¶) should not be counted as document characters/words.
actual_behaviors: After the change, the displayed statistics differ from the before-build for the same step/content (e.g., word count and character count are higher in the after screenshot: ~175 words / 958 characters vs ~168 words / 920 characters in before).
